texto: It is curious to note that when for reasons of conscience, people refuse to kill, they are often exempted from active military duty. But there are no exemptions for people who, for reasons of conscience, refuse to financially support the bureaucracy that actually does the killing. Apparently, the state takes money more seriously than life.
explicacao: Citação de Karl Hess sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It is curious to note that when for reasons of conscience, people refuse to kill, they are often …” articula negocios, anarchy, army em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como army e authoritarianism.
